creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the report.

I could not reproduce. We have LLVM 19.1.3 now in 15/current and it builds fine.

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        gohugo: 0.139.4,1

Number of packages to be removed: 1

The operation will free 47 MiB.
[current-default] [1/1] Deinstalling gohugo-0.139.4,1...

root@current-default:~ # clang --version
FreeBSD clang version 19.1.3 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-19.1.3-0-gab51eccf88f5)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd15.0

InstalledDir: /usr/bin
Build config: +assertions

Please, feel free to reopen if it fails for you after you update to a more recent current.
